title: Calendar view across multiple workspaces?
excerpt: I wanted to post here or in Marketing related to a lot of event-based or project timelines. Is it possible to sync calendars across multiple workspaces and choose high-level groups? Again this is across multiple workspac…

posts.author: workingmondays (Kyle Pollock)
posts.cookedHtml: I wanted to post here or in Marketing related to a lot of event-based or project timelines. Is it possible to sync calendars across multiple workspaces and choose high-level groups? Again this is across multiple workspaces if possible. This may exist, you can reply here with a guide or requesting here.
